title: VINEBOOMBLOCK
description: Adds Vine Boom block to the game. (block name: VINEBOOM)
body: This mod adds a vine boom block that you can get using the command: /give @s vine_boom_block:vineboom. when you walk on it, destroy it, or place it, it makes a vine boom sound. This is a hilarious mod and you can play around and make memes with your friends. It also adds a new subtitle to the game.
